summary_insight: 0 litigation cases and 0 compliance notices detected. Overall Risk: Low.
analyzed_headlines: ED searches premises linked to directors of Acme Corp Logistics Ltd. over alleged FEMA violations.
Recovery suit filed by HDFC Bank against Acme Corp Logistics Ltd. in Mumbai Civil Court.
Alert: CIN U74999MH2021PTC355000 associated with delayed GST filings for Acme Corp Logistics Ltd..
Petition for insolvency under IBC Section 7 against Acme Corp Logistics Ltd. admitted by NCLT Mumbai.
Show cause notice issued to Acme Corp Logistics Ltd. regarding related party disclosure lapses.
Acme Fireworks shop (Proprietor: Ramesh) caught fire in Pune market.
Industry-wide regulatory shifts impacting Acme Corp Logistics Ltd. and peers in manufacturing.
